title: Hey Diddle Diddle
content:
Hey diddle diddle! the cat and the fiddle,
    The cow skipt over the moon;
    The little dog laughed to see the fine sport,
    And the dish ran away with the spoon.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "Hey Diddle Diddle", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
